25 minutes of focus. 5 minute break. Repeat.

What is the Pomodoro Technique?

Developed by Francesco Cirillo, the Pomodoro Technique breaks work into 25-minute focused intervals separated by short 5-minute breaks.

After 4 sessions, take a longer 15-minute break. This trains your brain to focus deeply and helps you understand how long tasks actually take.
